judgment.summary: Strongly growing company with high margins and returns, trading at a premium valuation.
judgment.earningsRecap: Last quarter beat EPS estimate by 19.3%; next earnings date 2026-08-04.
positives: Revenue growth 22.2% YoY — robust top-line expansion.
Earnings growth 30.2% YoY — significant bottom-line improvement.
Profit margin 13.3% and ROE 51.3% — excellent profitability and returns.
Free cash flow $3.78B TTM — strong cash generation supports operations and dividends.
Consensus 'buy' rating from 26 analysts with a mean target of $920.14.
negatives: Forward P/E 29.00x and PEG 2.07x — valuation is demanding.
Debt/Equity 230.79% — high leverage on the balance sheet.
Beta 1.63 — stock is more volatile than the broader market.

news.paragraph: With no recent headlines to provide immediate context, traders should focus on Caterpillar's (CAT) strong fundamental picture and upcoming August earnings report. The company has a history of beating analyst estimates, and the current analyst consensus is a buy. Investors will be watching to see if CAT can maintain its growth trajectory and strong margins.
